name: TransUnion
description: TransUnion is a global information and insights company that enables businesses and consumers to make informed decisions. Founded in 1968 and headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company has evolved from its origins as a credit reporting agency into a comprehensive provider of data, analytics, and risk management solutions. TransUnion serves a diverse range of industries, helping organizations manage risk, prevent fraud, and build trust with their customers by providing accurate, actionable insights derived from vast datasets. Today, it operates as a critical player in the financial services ecosystem, facilitating secure and efficient economic transactions worldwide.
